testcase.name: test_connect_manual_failure_propagates
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.connections.test_connections_no_false_ok.TestConnectNoFalseOk object at 0x7fd0e8a1b690>
def test_connect_manual_failure_propagates(self): ctrl = MagicMock() ctrl.connect = MagicMock(return_value={"ok": False, "error": "REFUSED"}) ctrl.test_connection = MagicMock(return_value=False) b = ConnectionsBridge(michi_link_ctrl=ctrl) result = b.connectManual("192.168.1.1", 53318, "Test") > assert result["ok"] is False E assert True is False
tests/qml/connections/test_connections_no_false_ok.py:56: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_connect_manual_no_controller_saves_settings
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.connections.test_connections_no_false_ok.TestConnectNoFalseOk object at 0x7fd0e8a1b9d0>
def test_connect_manual_no_controller_saves_settings(self): b = ConnectionsBridge(michi_link_ctrl=None) result = b.connectManual("192.168.1.1", 53318, "Test") assert result["ok"] is True # settings saved even without live controller > assert b.microServerState == "connected" E AssertionError: assert 'detected' == 'connected' E E - connected E + detected

failure.message: Failed: Duplicate source '../pages/library/FolderBrowserPage.qml' for routes 'library/folders' and 'library/folders/:folderId'

testcase.name: test_aliases_point_to_valid_canonical_routes

failure.message: AssertionError: Aliases pointing to non-existent routes: [('playback', 'playback.nowplaying'), ('assistant', 'ai'), ('eq', 'equalizer'), ('metadata_inspector', 'metadata'), ('smart_tagging', 'tagging'), ('queue', 'playback.queue'), ('jobs', 'audio_lab.jobs'), ('mix_detail', 'mix.detail'), ('album_detail', 'library.albums.detail'), ('artist_detail', 'library.artists.detail'), ('playlist_detail', 'playlists.detail'), ('library/tracks', 'library.tracks'), ('library/albums', 'library.albums'), ('library/albums/:albumId', 'library.albums.detail'), ('library/artists', 'library.artists'), ('library/artists/:artistId', 'library.artists.detail'), ('library/folders', 'library.folders'), ('library/folders/:folderId', 'library.folders.detail'), ('library/sources', 'library.sources'), ('library/genres', 'library.genres'), ('library/genres/:genre', 'library.genres.detail'), ('library/composers', 'library.composers'), ('library/composers/:composer', 'library.composers.detail'), ('library/years', 'library.years'), ('library/recent', 'library.recent'), ('library/favorites', 'library.favorites'), ('library/unplayed', 'library.unplayed'), ('library/most-played', 'library.most_played'), ('library/missing', 'library.missing'), ('audio_lab_analysis', 'audio_lab.analysis'), ('audio_lab_conversion', 'audio_lab.conversion'), ('audio_lab_normalization', 'audio_lab.normalization'), ('audio_lab_replaygain', 'audio_lab.replaygain'), ('audio_lab_integrity', 'audio_lab.integrity'), ('audio_lab_comparison', 'audio_lab.comparison'), ('audio_lab_jobs', 'audio_lab.jobs'), ('audio_lab_profiles', 'audio_lab.profiles')] assert not [('playback', 'playback.nowplaying'), ('assistant', 'ai'), ('eq', 'equalizer'), ('metadata_inspector', 'metadata'), ('smart_tagging', 'tagging'), ('queue', 'playback.queue'), ...]

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_canonical_routes.TestNoDuplicateRoutes object at 0x7fd0bd886fd0> routes = ({'home': {'title': 'Inicio', 'source': '../pages/home/HomePage.qml', 'category': 'core', 'status': 'functional'}, 'li...'alias_of': 'equalizer', 'deprecated': True}, 'metadata_inspector': {'alias_of': 'metadata', 'deprecated': True}, ...})
def test_aliases_point_to_valid_canonical_routes(self, routes): ROUTES, ALIASES = routes bad = [] for alias, info in ALIASES.items(): target = info["alias_of"] if target not in ROUTES: bad.append((alias, target)) > assert not bad, f"Aliases pointing to non-existent routes: {bad}" E AssertionError: Aliases pointing to non-existent routes: [('playback', 'playback.nowplaying'), ('assistant', 'ai'), ('eq', 'equalizer'), ('metadata_inspector', 'metadata'), ('smart_tagging', 'tagging'), ('queue', 'playback.queue'), ('jobs', 'audio_lab.jobs'), ('mix_detail', 'mix.detail'), ('album_detail', 'library.albums.detail'), ('artist_detail', 'library.artists.detail'), ('playlist_detail', 'playlists.detail'), ('library/tracks', 'library.tracks'), ('library/albums', 'library.albums'), ('library/albums/:albumId', 'library.albums.detail'), ('library/artists', 'library.artists'), ('library/artists/:artistId', 'library.artists.detail'), ('library/folders', 'library.folders'), ('library/folders/:folderId', 'library.folders.detail'), ('library/sources', 'library.sources'), ('library/genres', 'library.genres'), ('library/genres/:genre', 'library.genres.detail'), ('library/composers', 'library.composers'), ('library/composers/:composer', 'library.composers.detail'), ('library/years', 'library.years'), ('library/recent', 'library.recent'), ('library/favorites', 'library.favorites'), ('library/unplayed', 'library.unplayed'), ('library/most-played', 'library.most_played'), ('library/missing', 'library.missing'), ('audio_lab_analysis', 'audio_lab.analysis'), ('audio_lab_conversion', 'audio_lab.conversion'), ('audio_lab_normalization', 'audio_lab.normalization'), ('audio_lab_replaygain', 'audio_lab.replaygain'), ('audio_lab_integrity', 'audio_lab.integrity'), ('audio_lab_comparison', 'audio_lab.comparison'), ('audio_lab_jobs', 'audio_lab.jobs'), ('audio_lab_profiles', 'audio_lab.profiles')] E assert not [('playback', 'playback.nowplaying'), ('assistant', 'ai'), ('eq', 'equalizer'), ('metadata_inspector', 'metadata'), ('smart_tagging', 'tagging'), ('queue', 'playback.queue'), ...]

testcase.name: test_real_flow_track_refresh
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.qml.test_wave9_vertical_end_to_end.TestWave10RealVerticalFlow object at 0x7fd0bd4c7050> library_db = (<sqlite3.Connection object at 0x7fd0b6d03c40>, PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-cristian/pytest-15/test_real_flow_track_refresh0/test_music.db'))
def test_real_flow_track_refresh(self, library_db): from PySide6.QtCore import QCoreApplication QCoreApplication.instance() or QCoreApplication() conn, db_path = library_db total = self._populate(conn) db = self._make_db_mock(conn, db_path) from ui_qml_bridge.query_executor import QueryExecutor from ui_qml_bridge.library_query_service import LibraryQueryService from ui_qml.models.TrackListModel import TrackListModel qe = QueryExecutor() qs = LibraryQueryService(db, db_path=str(db_path)) model = TrackListModel(query_service=qs, query_executor=qe) assert model.count == 0 assert model.loading is False model.refresh() assert model.loading is False # sync fallback > assert model.totalCount == total E assert 0 == 1000 E + where 0 = <ui_qml.models.TrackListModel.TrackListModel(0x55c9cb7c4540) at 0x7fd0bc5ae9c0>.totalCount
tests/qml/test_wave9_vertical_end_to_end.py:493: AssertionError

def test_real_flow_album_play(self, library_db): from PySide6.QtCore import QCoreApplication QCoreApplication.instance() or QCoreApplication() conn, db_path = library_db self._populate(conn) db = self._make_db_mock(conn, db_path) from core.worker_manager import WorkerManager from ui_qml_bridge.query_executor import QueryExecutor from ui_qml_bridge.library_query_service import LibraryQueryService from ui_qml_bridge.library_bridge import LibraryBridge wm = WorkerManager() qe = QueryExecutor(worker_manager=wm) qs = LibraryQueryService(db, db_path=str(db_path))
class FakePlayer: def __init__(s): s.enqueued = [] def enqueue(s, paths, play_now=False): s.enqueued = list(paths)
player = FakePlayer() bridge = LibraryBridge(db=db, playback_ctrl=player, query_service=qs, query_executor=qe) result = bridge.playAlbum("key_0_0") > assert result.get("ok") is True E AssertionError: assert False is True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd0b6c7ab00>('ok') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7fd0b6c7ab00> = {'ok': False, 'error': 'NO_TRACKS'}.get
